scripts.schedule:install: cp scripts/com.kelok.afcalendar.sync.plist "$HOME/Library/LaunchAgents/" && launchctl unload "$HOME/Library/LaunchAgents/com.kelok.afcalendar.sync.plist" 2>/dev/null; launchctl load "$HOME/Library/LaunchAgents/com.kelok.afcalendar.sync.plist" && echo 'Weekly sync scheduled: Sunday 22:30. Logs -> sync.log'
scripts.schedule:uninstall: launchctl unload "$HOME/Library/LaunchAgents/com.kelok.afcalendar.sync.plist" 2>/dev/null; rm -f "$HOME/Library/LaunchAgents/com.kelok.afcalendar.sync.plist" && echo 'Weekly sync removed.'
scripts.schedule:run: launchctl start com.kelok.afcalendar.sync && echo 'Triggered now — see sync.log'
